scripts.test: bun run --filter='@cinder/diff' build && bun run --filter='@cinder/markdown' build && bun run --filter='@cinder/editor' build && bun run --filter='@cinder/commentary' build && bun run scripts/run-tests.ts
scripts.validate: bun run scripts/check-raw-native-controls.ts --strict && bun run src/validate-playground.ts
scripts.vercel-build: bun run --filter='@cinder/diff' build && bun run --filter='@cinder/markdown' build && bun run --filter='@cinder/editor' build && bun run --filter='@cinder/commentary' build && bun run scripts/static-export.ts
